name: Favorite Brisket/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all excess fat from the brisket.
2. Combine seasonings until well blended; rub into the brisket.
3. Place meat in a crockpot with the fat side up. If necessary, cut to fit.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 12 hours.
5. Remove brisket from liquid and cut across the grain into thin slices.
6. Serve au jus.
